text.message: Only other thing I can do is plow
I was going there to begin with
and my wood pile got monoed
red just gonn pop devs now
He’s road and army at this point
that helps me do nothing lol
Road is win for u lol
red, why have you been blocking 8 brick?
you guys helped black cause you were afraid of me
you didn't realize black was getting road?
and u blocked the 8 brick all game
Only reason I have road is because the 3 and 11 decided to roll more than the 8
I have worst production, no chance at road, no knights
and you all thought lets help black win
I haven't helped black at all
I was behind for a while
I was just blocking the highest production hex
Both of yall had cities and I was still at one settle
black not giving up the gaslight
I’m not talking about you right now
I could have settled a long time ago, but trying to keep army out of your hands
Blue takes road for win I guess
